question: Question 1 — (1) What are the two things God promised the Physical Israelites who left Egypt? (2) Include 2 reference verses.
correct: If they kept the covenant, God would have them be His kingdom of priests and a holy nation; Do not worship any other gods

question: Question 2 — What is the purpose of God creating the physical realm according to the spiritual realm?
correct: To restore man and the earth and fulfill a world of God's reign

question: Question 3 — God selects one shepherd in every era and shows him the kingdom of heaven to fulfill on earth. Write who is the shepherd who sees the things of heaven and fulfillment on this earth in each era: (1) The time of Moses, (2) The 1st Coming, and (3) The 2nd Coming. Provide one reference for each.
correct: Moses, Ex 25:8-9
Jesus, Jn 5:19
New John, Rv 4; Rv 21

question: Question 4 — Fill in the blanks of the main points of Isa 1:1 and Isa 2:4, in order.
correct: Vision regarding Judah and Jerusalem; betrayal of the chosen people who were reared
Destruction of the chosen people by the gentiles; a place where all nations will come to learn
Turn spears into pruning hooks

question: Question 5 — Write why Revelation is important. Include 2 references.
correct: Because we receive eternal life by knowing the true God

question: Question 6 — Write (1) the reason and (2) the result of the chosen people of the Tabernacle of Heaven being defeated by the group of the dragon in Revelation. Additionally (3) the 12 Tribes in Revelation are created from what kind of people, and (4) what are the blessings they receive?
correct: Because they broke the covenant and betrayed like Adam
Fled in seven ways
Those who keep the new covenant
Forgiveness of sins, heaven, and eternal life

question: Question 7 — (1) Who is the promised shepherd of the Old Testament and (2) who is the promised shepherd of the New Testament, and what does each testify to?
correct: Jesus; the Old Testament prophecies and the physical fulfillment
The one who overcomes, New John; the prophecies of the New Testament, Revelation, and the physical fulfillment

question: Question 8 — (1) What is God's kingdom of the spiritual realm that comes down at the second coming? (2) Write on whom it comes down to. Include one reference.
correct: The holy city, the new Jerusalem
The promised shepherd of the New Testament, the one who overcomes, Rv 3:12; sheep-like believers, Mt 25:34

question: Question 9 — There are the subjects of the kingdom and those who sit in the kingdom of heaven in Mt 8:11-12. What are each of them referred to as in Mt 13?
correct: Those who are not harvested: the sons of the evil one (the devil)
Those who are harvested: the sons of heaven (God)

question: Question 10 — God prophesied the creation of a new thing through Jeremiah. Then, the completion of the creation of a new thing is fulfilled (1) when and (2) through what? Include one chapter.
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment
The creation of the twelve tribes of Shincheonji, Rv 21

question: Question 11 — (1) Where is the place of salvation to flee to at the second coming in Mt 24? (2) Who is at this place?
correct: Mt Zion, where God's throne comes down to
God's throne, Jesus, and God's family

question: Question 12 — The wedding banquet of the Lamb at the second coming occurs (1) after what event, (2) and where? (3) What is the evidence of the wedding banquet of the Lamb?
correct: After the judgment of Babylon in Rv 18
Shincheonji Church of Jesus, the Temple of the Tabernacle of the Testimony
God's oxen (betrayers) and fattened cattle (destroyers)

question: Question 13 — What is at the place where God and Jesus are? Include 2 references.
correct: The Word in the beginning, Jn 1:1; 1 Jn 1:1-2

question: Question 14 — What is God's objective?
correct: To create the twelve tribes, the new kingdom and new people
To seize and lock up the dragon
The marriage of spirit and flesh and God's reign

question: Question 15 — (1) What is the food of eternal life at the second coming? (2) Through whom can this be eaten? Give a reference for each.
correct: Hidden manna, Rv 2:17
The promised shepherd, New John, Rv 10

question: Question 16 — (1) What is the meaning of "counselor"? (2) Who is the advocate that came with the spirit of the counselor according to Jesus' promise at the second coming?
correct: A teacher who protects with grace (advocate)
The one who overcomes, New John

question: Question 17 — Write who the physical entities of the tree of life are on this earth at (1) the first coming and (2) the second coming.
correct: Jesus and the twelve disciples
The one who overcomes, New John, and the twelve tribes of Shincheonji

question: Question 18 — The effect of Jesus' blood appears (1) when and to (2) whom? Include the physical entities and reference verse.
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment
The 144,000 and the multitude in white of the twelve tribes of Shincheonji, Rv 1:5-6; Rv 5:9-10; Rv 7:14

question: Question 19 — (1) What fulfills when the last seventh trumpet is sounded? (2) After what event is the seventh trumpet blown?
correct: God's victory, resurrection, and eternal life
After the events of betrayal and destruction

question: Question 20 — What is the requirement to become God's son and receive the inheritance? Include one reference verse.
correct: Fight and overcome Satan (the devil), Rv 21:7

question: Question 21 — Although the churches of tradition have persecuted SCJ at the second coming, SCJ has overcome. What is the evidence that they overcame?
correct: As Jesus and the angels harvest with them, they bear 12 kinds of fruit every month and rapidly grow

question: Question 22 — (1) Who are the physical entities of those who keep the new covenant? (2) Who are they in Mt 8:11?
correct: The twelve tribes of Shincheonji
Those who are harvested from the east and the west and who sit in the kingdom of heaven

question: Question 23 — At the second coming when Revelation is fulfilled, what are (1) the elementary teachings and (2) the perfect teaching?
correct: All the words from the time of Adam to right before Revelation's fulfillment
The physical fulfillment of Revelation's prophecies

question: Question 24 — The recreation of heaven and earth in Gn 1 is fully completed (1) when and with whose appearance, and (2) through the creation of what?
correct: At the time of Revelation's fulfillment, with the appearance of the promised shepherd of the New Testament (the one who overcomes, New John)
New heaven and new earth

question: Question 25 — Explain the meaning of the name, Shincheonji Church of Jesus the Temple of the Tabernacle of the Testimony.
correct: New heaven new earth, that is, the new tabernacle and new saints
Jesus is the owner of the church
The tabernacle that testifies of the physical fulfillment of Revelation that was seen and heard
